title: Candy Crush Saga
notes:
Hoppas att du gillar att spela Candy Crush Saga! 

Varje vecka uppdaterar vi spelet med nya inslag, spännande nivåer och viktiga buggfixar som gör spelupplevelsen ännu smidigare. 

Glöm inte att ladda ner den senaste versionen för att få den bästa upplevelsen!

Första gången du spelar? Var inte blyg, det är bara att sätta igång!

title: Coin Master
notes:
Thanks for playing Coin Master!

In this version, we’ve implemented bug fixes & performance improvements.

We have also implemented our new reward calendar feature - collect your daily rewards! 

Enjoy a world of fun, thrills, and huge rewards right at your fingertips. 

Invite your friends to play Coin Master & get your FREE REWARDS! We also recommend joining our community on Facebook, X, and Instagram for more fun & excitement.

Enjoying Coin Master? Leave a review :)

title: Gossip Harbor®: Merge & Story
notes:
NEW EPISODE EVERY FRIDAY!
- NEW EPISODE: With new chapter updates every Friday; follow Quinn as she exposes secrets and solves puzzles.
- NEW EVENT:Visit Brimwave's Global Goblet watch party and score the Showcase Stage! Join Olivia, Colton, and Harrison and get into the soccer spirit. Explore by collecting points and unlock exclusive decorations to complete the event.

title: Kingshot
notes:
[New Content]
1. New Feature: The Prestige Shop has been fully upgraded, and the brand-new Prestige Merit Shop is now available! The Ageless Voidstar Skin Series has been upgraded, with new rally skins and other deluxe skins added. After completing the Ageless Voidstar Puzzle, you can also obtain an exclusive domain effect and Prestige Pouch for an even more premium experience.
Successfully unlocking the Skin Series will trigger a server-wide announcement to showcase your extraordinary honor!

title: Royal Match
notes:

New levels are coming in every two weeks! Be sure to update your game to get the latest content!

title: Total Battle: Krigsstrategi
notes:
Era baner kommer att vaja ännu högre den här säsongen, ers majestät. Se vad som väntar dig i V346:

Nyheter:

Den här månaden har vi infört ett nytt modereringssystem som avsevärt förbättrar chattmodereringen i hela spelet. Den här förändringen gör att vi kan upptäcka, granska och agera på olämpligt beteende mycket effektivare, vilket hjälper till att skapa en säkrare och trevligare erfarenhet för alla.

Buggfixar:

– Vi har hittat en möjlig lösning på problemet som gjorde att guldgruvor inte gi

title: Hero Wars: Alliance Rollspel
notes:
Skuggorna faller över Dominion.

Möt Crow.
Dominions legend är tillbaka på gatorna – med en ny relik, full utrustning och ett skymningsutseende i säsongspasset.

Fallet är inte avslutat än!
Crows äventyr är nu tillgängligt: följ ledtrådarna och lös mysteriet.

Färga dammen röd.
Cascade slår hårdare med sina helt nya röda handskar.

Tristan laddar upp!
Hans nya relik är här – skarpare än någonsin.

title: June's Journey: Dolda föremål
notes:
LEGACY'S ROAD – Res genom förlorade mysterier. Följ med June och Virginia på deras resa till mellanvästra USA, samla belöningar och spela temabaserade tidsbegränsade evenemang hela månaden.

JUNES FOTODAGBOK – Prova det spännande nya evenemanget, där June pusslar ihop sina minnen. Färdigställ fem foton för att återställa förlorade museiföremål och få exklusiva belöningar.

notes:

The World’s Game-uppdateringen innehåller även ett helt nytt nostalgiskt soundtrack.

title: Jelly Busters: Puzzle Game
notes: We are incredibly excited to announce the official launch of Jelly Busters! Drop into the coolest skatepark in town and experience a puzzle game that is as colorful and beautiful as it is satisfying. With soft ASMR pops, glowing hues, and hidden artistic masterpieces to destroy, every run is a relaxing yet thrilling ride...grab your board to join the crew and start busting!

title: Hunting Sniper: Showdown
notes:
Hunting Sniper Update Notes
• NEW TOUR: Tour 20 is now live, featuring brand-new content for you to explore.
• NEW EVENTS: The 3rd Anniversary Event is coming soon, with rich rewards waiting to be claimed.
• NEW BULLETS: Discover new themed Bullets with unique attributes to sharpen your hunt.
• PERFORMANCE OPTIMIZATION: Fixed known issues and improved overall game performance.

title: Call of Duty®: Mobile
notes:
The Phantom Thieves have infiltrated Call of Duty®: Mobile Season 6: Take Your Heart. Answer the Calling Card and deploy as Persona 5 Royal-inspired Operators, including Joker, Panther, and more. Secure the treasure in an all-new Battle Royale LTM, then wield the Mythic FFS Hurricane to complete the perfect heist. Take your time, then Take Over.

title: Match Masters
notes:
Leap into our latest update!
Meet Froggy Fu, our new zen Legendary booster. A lotus tile kicker that turns matches into big scores.
Space Chase returns, simplified and designed for smoother play!
Power-ups will return soon as a time-limited event, where your regular boosters will act as power-ups at no extra cost.
Update now and jump into the action!

title: Truck Star Match
notes:
Redo för en spännande uppdatering?

Upptäck mer spännande innehåll! Uppdatera nu och upplev det på nära håll!

title: Diablo Immortal
notes:
You don’t fight Hell — you command it. Bloodied Jewel unleashes new horrors in Lut Gholein, featuring new story content, 3 Helliquary bosses, and Ancient Legendary gear worth killing for. 

HELL OBEYS ME! Harness forbidden infernal magic as the Warlock, summoning devastating fiends and sacrificing everything for absolute power.

title: Slotomania™ Slots Vegas Casino
notes: Hi Slotomania Fans! Great news! We’ve packed the game with tons of exciting upgrades that will make your Slotomania experience smoother, richer, and more thrilling than ever. New slots are always on the way, and your favorite classics are right here waiting for you. Enjoy bigger wins, faster and smoother gameplay, exciting new features, and incredible quests. It’s the Slotomania you love-only better! Have fun and good luck!

title: Clash of Critters
notes:
1. Added new Lightning Tatari: Glowfly with unique Horde Invasion skills.
2. New Tier 4: Humbug→Hierotyrus (Rock), Zaplet→Umbraveil (Lightning).
3. Island Goldrush: Territory Defenders, faster point gains, league rewards final day.
4. Battle: class adjustments, Sand Control/Warship Roll fixes, Dojo bugfix.
5. Evolve Trials: preview higher tiers, event indicators, accurate switch tips.
6. Social: no invites/msgs from blocked players, profile via own avatar.
